chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1356 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 5756/2023 2.For orders on office objections. 3.For orders on CMA 5757/2023 4.For hearing of main case 21-09-2023 Mr. Muhammad Ali Dayo, Advocate for petitioner. ***** 1. Urgency is granted. 2-4. Learned counsel for petitioner, under instructions, does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
